place: Vista del Mar, Nai Thon, Phuket, Thailand
title: 3-Bedroom Sea-View Villa - Nai Thon
blurb: A contemporary three-bedroom sea-view villa at Vista del Mar, an exclusive low-density estate on the forested hillside above Nai Thon Beach. Set roughly 47 metres above the Andaman Sea, with an infinity-edge pool, full-height glass and open-plan living that flows straight out to the terrace and the horizon. Off-plan, from ฿38.7M.
detail:
A contemporary three-bedroom villa at Vista del Mar, conceived as a serene private retreat overlooking the emerald canopy of Nai Thon and the vast Andaman Sea. Positioned on the western slope above one of Phuket's most untouched beaches, the home opens to sea and sunset views and a soothing natural landscape shaped by the surrounding national park. From its elevated vantage point — roughly 47 metres above sea level — sea, sky and forest meet in a single panoramic frame.

Clean geometric lines, expansive glass façades and an effortless indoor–outdoor flow define the architecture. Across approximately 350 to 390 m² over two levels, the open-plan living and dining area is finished in soft neutral palettes and warm natural textures, with full-height sliding doors that let the sea view set the mood of the home. The main living pavilion opens directly onto a terrace and an infinity-edge pool — a tranquil space for open-air dining, quiet mornings and sunset gatherings.

The villa offers three serene en-suite bedrooms, each an intimate haven with walk-in wardrobes, generous bathrooms and wide windows framing either the gardens or the sea; the master suite enjoys direct terrace access and its own sunset panorama. Delivered fully finished with fitted kitchen, bathrooms and built-in elements, the home sits within Vista del Mar — a private, low-density estate of 17,000 m² with 24-hour security, on-site management and concierge services, just 600 metres above the pristine one-kilometre bay of Nai Thon Beach.

A strong investment as well as a home, with completion around 12 months from reservation. Current price list — Vista del Mar, January 2026:
Villa 8 · VX · 3 bed · 350 m² — ฿38,700,000 (best offer)
Villa 12 · LXc · 4–5 bed · 700 m², extra floor — ฿68,900,000
Villa 20 · LX/LF · 4–5 bed · 630 m², best view & no neighbour — ฿76,700,000
Villa 23 · Custom · 4–5 bed · 790 m² — ฿100,100,000
Villa 24 · Custom · 4–5 bed · 860 m² — ฿111,100,000
Villas 9, 10, 11, 14 and 16 are reserved; villas 1–7, 15, 17–19, 21 and 22 are sold.

Prices are for the completed villa; furniture packages and land freehold or lease structuring are quoted separately. Offered freehold.
internalName: Vista del Mar — 3-bed sea-view villa (Villa 8/9 type; renders Villa 10, cover Villa 22)
